violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory noted with empty food bag inside. This sink is only to be used to wash hands.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Damp wiping cloths noted laying on counters.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use scoops for ice and in food bins noted being stored with the handle laying in ice and food product.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hhand washing lavatory noted being used for other than hand washing. (Plastic container noted in sink also plastic garbage bag hung on faucet)
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided. Quat = 200 to 400 ppm.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Bag of food product noted on floor. Be sure all products in bins are labeled and easy to read.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): Cell phone noted on stainless steel countertop; not properly stored.
